commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a warning in `sendCompactionNotice` when `notifyUser` is enabled but no `onBlockReply` stream is available.

PR surface: Source +9. Total +9 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: enable `agents.defaults.compaction.notifyUser`, emit a compaction event without `opts.onBlockReply`, and current main returns before sending the notice.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide whether a log-only mitigation is worth merging and how to keep the full user-visible delivery bug tracked.

target.title: fix(compaction): log when compaction notice is skipped due to missing block-reply stream
target.body:
sendCompactionNotice silently returned when onBlockReply was unavailable (e.g. proactive maxHistoryShare-triggered compaction or subagent-completion auto-announce). This made 
otifyUser: true appear broken in async compaction paths with no visible signal.

Log a warning at default log level so operators can see that compaction did occur even when the user-facing notice could not be delivered through the streaming block-reply channel.

## Verification
- Existing tests pass (agent-runner-execution: 155/155)
- Lint clean

Closes #88933
